locator.quote: There isn't enough room in 128 dims to carry per-runner direction information for 14 runners cleanly

text: There is not enough room in the LSTM 128-dim summary to carry per-runner direction info for 14 runners cleanly, even with a slot embedding.

locator.quote: the bottleneck is the LSTM-compression pathway, not the head architecture

text: Phase-14 pre-staged the test: if direction BCE stays flat on the gate-off arm, the bottleneck is the LSTM-compression pathway, not the head architecture.
